title: 00-04: ESLint + Prettier config
description: ESLint config s Next.js preset + TypeScript rules. Prettier pro code formatting. lint-staged + husky pre-commit hook (optional). npm run lint musí projít čistě. .eslintrc.json nebo eslint.config.mjs.

title: 00-05: Environment config + .env.example
description: .env.example se všemi potřebnými env vars: DATABASE_URL, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_URL, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_S3_BUCKET, AWS_REGION, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS. .gitignore: .env, node_modules, .next, prisma/*.db.

title: 00-02: Tailwind CSS setup
description: Instalace a konfigurace Tailwind CSS v4. tailwind.config.ts s content paths. Globální styly v globals.css. Ověřit že utility classes fungují v dev serveru.

title: 00-03: Prisma ORM setup + DB connection
description: npm install prisma @prisma/client. npx prisma init. Konfigurace DATABASE_URL v .env (PostgreSQL). Prázdné schema.prisma s datasource a generator. npx prisma db push ověří connection. .env.example s placeholder hodnotami.

title: 00-01: Next.js + TypeScript strict init
description: npx create-next-app@latest s TypeScript, App Router. tsconfig.json: strict: true. Ověřit npm run dev funguje. Základní folder structure: src/app/, src/components/, src/lib/, src/types/.

title: EPIC-00: Project Bootstrap
description: Inicializace Next.js projektu se vším potřebným pro start implementace. Outcome: funkční dev environment s Next.js, TypeScript strict, Tailwind CSS, Prisma ORM, ESLint, základní folder structure. Scope boundary: jen tooling a skeleton — žádná business logika. Musí proběhnout před jakoukoli feature prací.

title: 00-06: Base layout + placeholder pages
description: Root layout s Tailwind, metadata, font setup. Placeholder stránky: / (landing), /login, /signup, /dashboard. Jednoduchý nav komponent. Ověřit routing funguje. Žádná business logika — jen skeleton pro navigaci.

title: 07-04: Contributor confirmation/rejection flow
description: PUT /api/splits/confirmations/[confirmationId]/confirm — contributor potvrdí svou alokaci. PUT /api/splits/confirmations/[confirmationId]/reject — contributor odmítne. Po každé odpovědi: přepočítat parent SplitRecord status (partially_confirmed → confirmed/rejected). Confirmed = všichni potvrdili. Rejected = alespoň jeden odmítl. Frontend: confirmation page/modal s split detail + accept/reject tlačítka. Notifikace ownera o každé odpovědi.

title: 07-03: Submit split for confirmation
description: POST /api/projects/[id]/splits/[splitId]/submit — owner only. Validace: total = 100% (hard block per PRD), alespoň 1 contributor s non-zero share. Status → pending_confirmation. Vytvoří SplitConfirmation pro každého contributora s non-zero %. Odešle notification každému contributorovi. Nelze editovat po submitu.

title: 07-02: Create + edit split draft API
description: POST /api/projects/[id]/splits — owner only. Vytvoří SplitRecord status=draft. POST /api/projects/[id]/splits/[splitId]/contributors — přidá contributor (userId, role, percentage). PUT/DELETE contributor entries. Validace: contributor musí být project member. Owner může editovat draft volně. Frontend: split editor s contributor řádky, role selector, percentage input, running total indicator.

title: 07-01: Prisma schema — SplitRecord, SplitContributor, SplitConfirmation
description: Model SplitRecord: id, projectId (FK), createdById (FK User), status enum [draft/pending_confirmation/partially_confirmed/confirmed/rejected/superseded], supersededById (nullable self-FK), submittedAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Model SplitContributor: id, splitRecordId (FK), userId (FK), role (string — producer/vocalist/mixer/etc), percentage (decimal, 0-100), createdAt. Model SplitConfirmation: id, splitContributorId (FK), status enum [pending/confirmed/rejected/expired], respondedAt, createdAt. Constraints: unique (splitRecordId, userId). Validace: sum(percentage) = 100 enforced na API.

title: 06-05: Activity log recording
description: Automatické logování klíčových eventů do ActivityLog: file_uploaded, version_published, member_joined, member_removed, comment_added, split_submitted, split_confirmed, project_archived. Implementace: utility funkce logActivity(projectId, actorId, action, target, metadata) volaná z relevantních API handlerů. Žádné ruční volání — integrovat do existujících flows.

title: 06-02: Create comment thread + reply API
description: POST /api/projects/[id]/comments — vytvoří thread s prvním commentem. Body: targetType, targetId, body. Authz: owner + editor + commenter (ne viewer). POST /api/projects/[id]/comments/[threadId]/replies — přidá reply do existujícího threadu. Validace: body non-empty, target existuje a patří projektu. Response: thread/comment object.

title: 06-03: Comment listing + thread UI
description: GET /api/projects/[id]/comments?targetType=&targetId= — threads filtrované podle target (project-level, file-level, version-level). Každý thread: author, first comment preview, reply count, status, timestamps. GET /api/projects/[id]/comments/[threadId] — plný thread s replies. Frontend: comment panel/sidebar na project detail, file detail, version detail. Expandable threads.

title: 06-01: Prisma schema — CommentThread, Comment, ActivityLog
description: Model CommentThread: id, projectId (FK), targetType enum [project/file/version], targetId, authorId (FK User), status enum [open/resolved/deleted_soft], createdAt, updatedAt. Model Comment: id, threadId (FK), authorId (FK User), body (text), deletedAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Model ActivityLog: id, projectId (FK), actorId (FK User), action enum [file_uploaded/version_published/member_joined/comment_added/split_submitted/...], targetType, targetId, metadata (JSON), createdAt. Index na projectId+targetType+targetId, threadId.

title: 04-04: Version detail page
description: GET /api/projects/[id]/versions/[versionId] — version metadata + plný file list s download linky. Frontend: /projects/[id]/versions/[versionId] s changelog zobrazením, file tabulkou (název, typ, velikost, download). Immutabilita: published version UI nemá edit tlačítka. Superseded verze: vizuální indikátor.

title: 04-03: Version history list
description: GET /api/projects/[id]/versions — paginovaný seznam verzí, nejnovější first. Každá verze: name, author, changelog, publishedAt, file count. Filtr: published only (default), all (pro owner). Frontend: versions tab na project detail s timeline/list layoutem. Klik → version detail.

title: 04-02: Publish version API
description: POST /api/projects/[id]/versions — přijme name (required), changelog, fileIds[]. Validace: alespoň 1 file, všechny fileIds musí patřit projektu a být status=ready. Vytvoří version se status=published, publishedAt=now. Předchozí published version → superseded. Authz: owner + editor. Response: version object s file list.

title: 04-01: Prisma schema — ProjectVersion
description: Model ProjectVersion: id, projectId (FK), authorId (FK User), name, changelog, status enum [draft/published/superseded/deleted_soft], publishedAt, deletedAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Junction table VersionFile: versionId + fileId (FK ProjectFile). Relace: Project 1:N ProjectVersion, ProjectVersion M:N ProjectFile. Index na projectId, status.

title: Tighten Stream 2 marketplace epic boundaries and lifecycle ownership
description: Current marketplace epics overlap on state and ownership. EPIC-10 includes downstream application/hire/delivery/payment states that belong in EPIC-11 and EPIC-12. Refine epic scopes and lifecycle boundaries so discovery, hiring, and payouts have non-overlapping acceptance and state ownership.

title: Decompose launch-critical versioning, comments, and splits epics into executable tasks
description: EPIC-04, EPIC-06, and EPIC-07 are launch-critical in PRD v2 but currently have no numbered child tasks in beads. Break them down into schema/API/UI/state/audit tasks so each launch-critical capability can be delivered end-to-end with edge cases and failure handling.

title: 08-04: Access enforcement middleware
description: Middleware withActiveSubscription() pro routes vyžadující platný subscription. Logika: trialing/active → allow all. past_due → read access ano, creation/upload/publish blokováno (PRD). canceled/expired → redirect na /pricing. Enforcement musí být na API úrovni, ne jen UI. Grace period: past_due toleruje N dní před hard block.

title: 08-03: Stripe webhook handler
description: POST /api/webhooks/stripe — přijme Stripe events, ověří signature. Handled events: checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.created, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted, invoice.payment_succeeded, invoice.payment_failed. Každý event: update Subscription status, log PaymentEvent. Idempotence: check stripeEventId uniqueness. past_due handling: grace period tracking.

title: 08-02: Stripe checkout session + customer creation
description: POST /api/billing/checkout — vytvoří Stripe Customer (pokud neexistuje), vytvoří Checkout Session pro zvolený plán, vrátí session URL. Stripe product/price musí být předkonfigurované. Trial period: N dní (14d default). Po úspěšném checkout: webhook zpracuje subscription create event. Frontend: /pricing stránka s plan selection + checkout redirect.

title: 08-01: Prisma schema — Subscription, PaymentEvent
description: Model Subscription: id, userId (FK unique), stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, plan enum [trial/pro/team], status enum [trialing/active/past_due/canceled/expired], trialEndsAt, currentPeriodEnd, canceledAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Model PaymentEvent: id, subscriptionId (FK), stripeEventId (unique), type, payload (JSON), processedAt, createdAt. Index na stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, status.

title: 05-04: Accept/decline invitation flow
description: GET /api/invitations/accept?token=xxx — ověří token, není expired/revoked. Pokud user přihlášený a email match → vytvoří ProjectMember s přiřazenou rolí, status → accepted. Pokud nepřihlášený → redirect na login/signup, po auth dokončí accept. Frontend: /invitations/[token] stránka. Edge cases: expired → error + contact owner, already member → redirect na project.

title: 05-03: Invite collaborator API + UI
description: POST /api/projects/[id]/invitations — owner only (PRD). Přijme email + role. Generuje invitation token, odešle email s invite linkem. Pokud invitee už je member → 409. Pokud pending invite pro email existuje → 409. Frontend: invite dialog na project settings/members. Bulk invite (volitelné): víc emailů najednou.

title: 05-01: Prisma schema — ProjectMember, Invitation
description: Model ProjectMember: id, projectId (FK), userId (FK), role enum [owner/editor/commenter/viewer], joinedAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Unique constraint: (projectId, userId). Model Invitation: id, projectId (FK), inviterId (FK User), inviteeEmail, inviteeUserId (nullable FK), role enum, status enum [pending/accepted/revoked/expired], token (unique), expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Index na projectId, inviteeEmail, token, status.

title: 05-02: RBAC middleware — server-side authorization
description: Middleware withProjectAuth(requiredRoles) pro API routes. Načte ProjectMember pro current user + projectId, ověří roli. Permission matrix dle PRD role table: Owner (all), Editor (upload/publish/edit/comment), Commenter (read+comment), Viewer (read-only). Admin override. Deny → 403. Neexistující membership → 404 (info leak prevention). Musí být server-side, ne jen UI hiding.

title: 03-05: File listing + secure download
description: GET /api/projects/[id]/files — seznam souborů projektu, paginovaný, sortable. GET /api/projects/[id]/files/[fileId]/download — vrátí presigned download URL (short-lived). Authz: všechny project role mohou stahovat (Viewer+). Frontend: file list v project detail s download tlačítkem. Metadata zobrazení: název, typ, velikost, uploader, datum.

title: 03-04: Multi-file batch upload UI
description: Frontend komponenta pro drag-and-drop nebo file picker s multi-select. Per-file progress bar. Per-file error handling — jeden failed upload nesmí zabít ostatní (PRD requirement). Upload queue: sekvenční nebo parallel (max 3 concurrent). UI states: selecting → uploading → done/partial-error. Retry tlačítko pro failed files.

title: 03-03: Single file upload API
description: POST /api/projects/[id]/files/upload-url — vrátí presigned URL + fileId pro klientský upload. POST /api/projects/[id]/files/confirm — po úspěšném S3 uploadu klient potvrdí, backend ověří existence v S3, status → ready. Authz: owner + editor. Validace: file type whitelist, size limit. Failure: status → failed pokud confirm neprojde.

title: 03-02: S3 infrastructure — bucket, presigned URLs, config
description: AWS S3 bucket setup (nebo kompatibilní object storage). Utility funkce: generatePresignedUploadUrl(key, contentType, maxSize), generatePresignedDownloadUrl(key, expiresIn). Config: bucket name, region, credentials v env vars. Max file size: 2GB (PRD). Folder structure: projects/{projectId}/files/{fileId}/{filename}.

title: 03-01: Prisma schema — ProjectFile
description: Model ProjectFile: id, projectId (FK), uploaderId (FK User), filename, originalName, mimeType, fileSize, s3Key, s3Bucket, status enum [uploading/ready/failed/deleted_soft], deletedAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Index na projectId, status. Supported types: mp3, wav, aiff, zip, pdf, txt, docx, png, jpg.

title: 02-04: Project list / dashboard
description: GET /api/projects — vrátí projekty kde je current user owner nebo member, paginované, sortable by updatedAt. Frontend: /dashboard nebo /projects s kartovým layoutem. Filtr: owned / member / all. Empty state pro nové uživatele s CTA na create project.

title: 02-03: Project detail page
description: GET /api/projects/[projectId] — vrátí project data + member count + file count. Frontend: /projects/[id] s metadata zobrazením, tabs pro files/versions/comments/splits/settings. Authz: pouze project members a admin vidí detail. 404 pro non-members.

title: 02-02: Create project API + UI
description: POST /api/projects — vytvoří projekt s title (required), description, genre. Validace: title min 3 chars, max 100. Owner = current user. Status = active. Frontend: /projects/new formulář + redirect na project detail po úspěchu. Auth required (withAuth middleware).

title: 02-01: Prisma schema — Project
description: Model Project: id, ownerId (FK User), title, description, genre, tags[], coverImageUrl, status enum [active/archived/suspended/deleted_soft], deletedAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Relace: User 1:N Project. Index na ownerId, status. Migrace.

title: 01-05: Onboarding flow
description: Po prvním přihlášení verified usera: onboarding wizard (1-2 kroky). Krok 1: displayName (required), headline, bio. Krok 2: skills, genres (optional, skippable). Po completion: User.status=onboarded. API: PUT /api/onboarding — update Profile fields + status transition. Frontend: /onboarding stránka, redirect pokud status!=onboarded. Skip musí být možný pro optional pole.

title: 01-04: Login, session management, logout
description: POST /api/auth/login — email + password, verify against hash, return JWT/session cookie. Session strategy: httpOnly secure cookie s JWT nebo server-side session. GET /api/auth/me — vrátí current user + profile. POST /api/auth/logout — invaliduje session. Middleware: withAuth() pro protected routes, extrahuje userId z session. Edge cases: wrong password → 401, unverified account → 403 s hint na re-verify, suspended → 403.

title: 01-03: Email verification flow
description: GET /api/auth/verify?token=xxx — ověří token validitu a expiraci, nastaví User.status=verified, invaliduje token (usedAt). Frontend stránka /verify s loading → success/error state. Edge cases: expired token → re-send option, already verified → redirect to login, invalid token → 400.

title: 01-02: Signup API endpoint
description: POST /api/auth/signup — přijme email + password, validuje formát a sílu hesla, hashuje bcrypt/argon2, vytvoří User se status=unverified, vytvoří Profile stub, vygeneruje EmailVerification token, odešle verifikační email. Response: 201 s userId. Edge cases: duplicitní email → 409, slabé heslo → 422, rate limiting.

title: 01-01: Prisma schema — User, Profile, EmailVerification
description: Vytvořit Prisma modely pro User (id, email, passwordHash, status [unverified/verified/onboarded/suspended], createdAt, updatedAt), Profile (userId, displayName, headline, bio, avatarUrl, skills[], genres[], priceRange, createdAt, updatedAt), EmailVerification (userId, token, expiresAt, usedAt). Relace: User 1:1 Profile, User 1:N EmailVerification. Index na email (unique), token (unique). Migrace musí proběhnout čistě.

title: EPIC-08: Subscription & Billing
description: Stripe subscription integration, trial-to-paid flow, access enforcement. Outcome: users start with trial, convert to paid, failed payments trigger past_due with grace period blocking new creation actions. Scope boundary: no free tier post-trial, no annual plans in MVP, Stripe is billing source of truth. Main entities: Subscription, PaymentRecord. States: trialing → active → past_due → canceled → expired. Key rules: past_due retains read access but blocks uploads/projects/gig publish.

title: EPIC-07: Ownership Splits
description: Contributor split records and confirmation workflow. Outcome: owner can create project-level split drafts, submit for contributor confirmation, contributors confirm/reject their allocation, confirmed splits are immutable. Scope boundary: project-level only (no track-level), not a legal enforcement system, no royalty ingestion. Main entities: SplitRecord, SplitConfirmation. Split states: draft → pending_confirmation → partially_confirmed → confirmed/rejected → superseded. Confirmation states: pending → confirmed/rejected/expired. Rule: total must equal 100% before submission.

title: EPIC-06: Comments & Activity
description: Comment threads on project/file/version, activity logging, notification events. Outcome: authorized users can create/reply to plain text comment threads, activity feed tracks key events, notification system delivers events. Scope boundary: no waveform-timestamped comments, no chat/messaging, no @mentions in MVP. Main entities: CommentThread, Comment. Thread states: open → resolved → deleted_soft.

title: EPIC-05: Collaboration & Permissions
description: Invitations, role-based membership, RBAC enforcement. Outcome: owner can invite collaborators, assign roles (Owner/Editor/Commenter/Viewer), server-side permission enforcement on all operations. Scope boundary: only owner invites in MVP, no delegation, no team/org layer. Main entities: ProjectMember, Invitation. Invitation states: pending → accepted/revoked/expired. Role capabilities per PRD role matrix.

title: EPIC-04: Version Management
description: Snapshot-based project versioning. Outcome: owner/editor can publish named version snapshots with changelog and file list, versions are immutable after publish. Scope boundary: no git-like merging, no diffing, no branching. Main entities: ProjectVersion. States: draft → published → superseded → deleted_soft.

title: EPIC-03: File Management & Storage
description: Multi-file upload, S3 storage, file type validation, batch processing. Outcome: owner/editor can upload supported files (mp3, wav, aiff, zip, pdf, txt, docx, png, jpg), files stored in S3 with signed URLs, per-file error isolation in batch. Scope boundary: max 2GB per file, no transcoding, no waveform rendering. Main entities: ProjectFile. Upload model: multi-file batch UI, per-file backend processing.

title: EPIC-02: Project Hub Core
description: Project CRUD, metadata, lifecycle management. Outcome: creator can create, edit, archive projects with proper state transitions. Scope boundary: no templates, no project cloning, no public projects. Main entities: Project. States: active → archived → suspended → deleted_soft.

title: EPIC-01: Auth & Onboarding
description: Signup, email verification, profile creation, onboarding flow. Outcome: user can register, verify email, complete onboarding, and have an active account with profile. Scope boundary: no social login, no SSO — email+password only for MVP. Main entities: User, Profile, EmailVerification. States: unverified → verified → onboarded.

title: 07-06: Split detail view
description: GET /api/projects/[id]/splits — list všech split records (current + history). GET /api/projects/[id]/splits/[splitId] — detail s contributors, percentages, confirmation statuses. Frontend: splits tab na project detail. Current split prominent, historie collapsible. Každý contributor: jméno, role, %, confirmation status badge. Export do PDF/CSV (nice-to-have).

title: 07-05: Split revision (supersede)
description: PRD: confirmed splits nelze editovat in place, změny vyžadují novou revizi. POST /api/projects/[id]/splits — pokud existuje confirmed split, nový draft automaticky reference supersededById na předchozí. Po confirm nového: starý → superseded. Frontend: revision history na split detail. Vizuální indikátor current vs superseded. Diff view (optional, nice-to-have).

title: 06-07: Notification events
description: PRD vyžaduje notification events pro comments, invites, version publication. Model Notification: id, userId (FK), type enum, title, body, isRead, sourceType, sourceId, createdAt. API: GET /api/notifications — user's notifications. PUT /api/notifications/[id]/read. Frontend: bell icon s unread count, dropdown s notification list. Delivery: in-app only pro MVP (email notifications optional/later).

title: 06-06: Activity feed UI
description: GET /api/projects/[id]/activity — paginovaný feed, nejnovější first. Frontend: activity tab na project detail. Každý entry: actor avatar+name, akce popis, target link, timestamp. Grouping stejných typů eventů (3 files uploaded → 1 entry). Empty state.

title: 06-04: Comment moderation — resolve, delete
description: PUT /api/projects/[id]/comments/[threadId]/resolve — owner/admin only. Status → resolved. Resolved threads: vizuálně odlišené, collapsed by default. DELETE /api/projects/[id]/comments/[commentId] — soft delete vlastního recentního commentu (owner/editor/commenter) nebo moderace (owner/admin). PRD: 'delete own recent comment' — definovat 'recent' (15 min?).

title: 04-05: Version soft delete
description: DELETE /api/projects/[id]/versions/[versionId] — owner only. Status → deleted_soft, deletedAt = now. Hidden z UI, retained 30d. Nelze smazat jedinou published verzi bez varování. Edge case: smazání current version → předchozí superseded se stane current? Nebo žádná current? Definovat pravidlo.

title: Review epic breakdown against PRD v2
description: Evaluate whether the current beads epic structure matches PRD v2 launch-critical scope, Stream 2 boundaries, and decision log constraints. Record concrete findings and file follow-up issues for breakdown gaps or scope overlaps.

title: Align admin/support epic with MVP vs Stream 2 operational scope
description: Admin epic mixes MVP admin controls with Stream 2 payout operations. Clarify which admin capabilities are launch-critical versus marketplace-dependent, and add missing dependencies or split the work if payout hold/release and KYC review must wait for marketplace payments/payouts.

title: 09-05: Admin actions — restrict/restore project
description: POST /api/admin/projects/[id]/restrict — Project.status=suspended, AdminAction log. Restricted project: inaccessible pro všechny členy kromě admin. POST /api/admin/projects/[id]/restore — reverze. Frontend: action button na admin project detail.

title: 09-04: Admin actions — suspend/unsuspend account
description: POST /api/admin/users/[id]/suspend — body: reasonCode, internalNote. Nastaví User.status=suspended, vytvoří AdminAction log. Suspended user: login blocked, API returns 403. POST /api/admin/users/[id]/unsuspend — reverze. Frontend: action button na user detail s reason dialog.

title: 09-03: Admin lookup — users, projects, gigs, payments
description: GET /api/admin/users?search=&status= — hledání podle email/name, filtr status. GET /api/admin/projects?search=&status= — hledání podle title/owner. GET /api/admin/payments?userId=&status= — payment/subscription lookup. Každý endpoint: paginace, sortování. Frontend: tabulkové views s filtry a search.

title: 09-02: Admin auth guard + layout
description: Middleware withAdmin() — ověří isAdmin flag na User. Admin routes pod /admin/*. Frontend: /admin layout s navigací (Users, Projects, Payments, Audit Log). Non-admin → 403. Samostatný layout od main app.

title: 09-01: Prisma schema — AdminAction, admin role
description: Model AdminAction: id, actorId (FK User), actionType enum [suspend_account/unsuspend_account/suspend_gig/unpublish_gig/restrict_project/restore_project/hold_payout/release_payout], targetType enum [user/project/gig/payout], targetId, reasonCode, internalNote, createdAt. User model extension: isAdmin boolean flag nebo role enum. Index na targetType+targetId, actorId, createdAt.

title: 08-06: Trial expiry + conversion prompt
description: Cron nebo lazy check: subscriptions kde trialEndsAt < now a status=trialing → status expired. UI: banner/modal pro trialing users s countdown do konce trialu. Expired trial: hard redirect na /pricing, block creation actions. Email notifikace: 3 dny před expirací, den expirací.

title: 08-05: Subscription management UI
description: GET /api/billing/subscription — current plan, status, period end, cancel date. POST /api/billing/portal — vytvoří Stripe Customer Portal session pro self-service management (update payment, cancel). Frontend: /settings/billing s aktuálním plánem, statusem, payment method info, cancel/manage tlačítka via portal redirect.

title: 05-06: Invitation lifecycle — expiry, revocation
description: Expiry: cron/scheduled job nebo lazy check — invitations starší než N dní (14d default) → status expired. DELETE /api/projects/[id]/invitations/[invId] — owner revoke, status → revoked. Revoked a expired invites nejsou reusable (PRD). GET /api/projects/[id]/invitations — list pending invites pro owner. Frontend: pending invites seznam s revoke tlačítkem.

title: 05-05: Member management — role change, remove
description: PUT /api/projects/[id]/members/[memberId] — owner only, změna role. DELETE /api/projects/[id]/members/[memberId] — owner only, odebrání membera. Nelze odebrat sám sebe jako owner. Nelze degradovat posledního ownera. Frontend: member list na project settings s role dropdown a remove button.

title: 03-06: File delete (soft delete)
description: DELETE /api/projects/[id]/files/[fileId] — soft delete, status → deleted_soft, deletedAt = now. Authz: owner only pro published files (PRD role matrix). Soft deleted files skryté z UI, S3 objekt retained během retention window (30d). Edge case: soubor zahrnutý v published version → warning/block?

title: 02-06: Project metadata editing
description: PUT /api/projects/[id] — update title, description, genre, tags, coverImage. Authz: owner + editor. Frontend: inline edit na project detail nebo /projects/[id]/settings. Validace stejná jako create.

title: 02-05: Project lifecycle — archive, soft delete
description: PUT /api/projects/[id]/archive — owner only, status → archived. Archived project = read-only, no new uploads/versions/invites. PUT /api/projects/[id]/restore — archived → active. DELETE /api/projects/[id] — soft delete, status → deleted_soft, deletedAt = now. Soft deleted projects hidden z UI, retained 30 dnů (PRD). Edge cases: nelze archivovat suspended projekt.

title: Update MusicCollabHub vault project map
description: Vault project map is stale and still says the project is waiting for MVP implementation with PRD v1. Update the vault entry to reflect the current repository state, including the ready PRD and current root artifacts.

title: 01-08: GDPR minimum — account delete/export request
description: PRD vyžaduje minimum GDPR workflows pro delete/export. API: POST /api/account/delete-request — vytvoří soft-delete request, vyžaduje password confirmation + email re-verify. Systém: po 30 dnech (retention window z PRD) permanent delete. POST /api/account/export-request — spustí async export uživatelských dat do JSON. Stav requestu trackovaný v DB. Frontend: /settings/account s delete a export tlačítky + confirmation dialog.

title: 01-07: Password reset flow
description: POST /api/auth/forgot-password — přijme email, vygeneruje reset token, odešle email. POST /api/auth/reset-password — přijme token + nové heslo, validuje token, updatuje hash, invaliduje token. Frontend: /forgot-password a /reset-password stránky. Edge cases: neexistující email → stejná response (info leak prevention), expired token → re-request, rate limiting na forgot endpoint.

title: 01-06: Creator profile page
description: Stránka /profile/[userId] zobrazující veřejný profil: displayName, headline, bio, avatar, skills, genres. API: GET /api/users/[userId]/profile — veřejná data. Editace vlastního profilu: /settings/profile s PUT /api/profile. Avatar upload: přes S3 presigned URL nebo jednoduché API upload (max 5MB, jpg/png). Portfolio sekce (až 10 work samples/linků) je defined v PRD ale může být phased — minimálně UI placeholder.

title: EPIC-09: Admin & Support Tooling
description: Internal admin dashboard for operations and support. Outcome: admin can lookup users/projects/gigs/payments, suspend accounts/gigs/projects, hold/release payouts, view audit trails. Scope boundary: internal-only UI, no customer-facing admin, no automated moderation. Main entities: AdminAction (audit log). Actions: suspend/unsuspend account, suspend/unpublish gig, restrict/restore project, hold/release payout. Every action logs actor, target, timestamp, reason code, optional note.

title: 09-06: Audit trail viewer
description: GET /api/admin/audit?targetType=&targetId=&actorId=&from=&to= — filtrovaný list AdminAction záznamů. Frontend: /admin/audit tabulka s filtry. Každý záznam: actor name, action type, target link, reason, note, timestamp. Sortování: newest first. Export: optional CSV.

title: EPIC-12: Marketplace — Payments & Payouts [Stream 2]
description: Stripe Connect onboarding, marketplace payment collection, payout lifecycle. Outcome: buyer pays for gig work through Stripe, platform deducts fee, talent receives payout via Stripe Connect on buyer approval or auto-release after 7 days. Admin can hold payout. Scope boundary: Stream 2 — not launch-blocking. No escrow engine, no complex refund automation. Main entities: PaymentRecord, PayoutRecord. Payment states: requires_payment → processing → succeeded/failed → refunded/cancelled. Payout states: blocked → scheduled → in_transit → paid/failed/reversed. Blocking reasons: incomplete Connect onboarding, KYC, review window, admin hold.

title: EPIC-11: Marketplace — Hiring & Delivery [Stream 2]
description: Application submission, hire acceptance, delivery workflow, access handoff. Outcome: talent applies to gig, buyer accepts one applicant (others auto-rejected/expired), hired talent gets restricted access by default (Commenter/Viewer), owner explicitly grants broader access. Scope boundary: Stream 2 — not launch-blocking. No milestone engine, no automated revision rounds, no escrow. Main entities: GigApplication, Hire/Delivery contract. Application states: submitted → withdrawn/accepted/rejected/expired. Delivery states: awaiting_start → in_progress → delivered → approved/cancelled.

title: EPIC-10: Marketplace — Gigs & Discovery [Stream 2]
description: Gig creation, publishing, browsing, filtering. Outcome: creator can draft a gig under existing project, publish to marketplace, talent can browse and filter published gigs. Scope boundary: Stream 2 — not launch-blocking. No reviews/ratings, no standalone gigs (every gig belongs to a project). Main entities: Gig. States: draft → published → applied → hired → in_progress → delivered → approved → closed/cancelled/suspended. Portfolio: headline, bio, skills, genres, price range, up to 10 samples.
